message:
chore: expand clippy allows, remove test_tokio_watch from workspace, clean tracked build artifacts

- asupersync.rs: expand clippy allow list to suppress noisy lints in
  the CLI binary (too_many_lines, too_many_arguments, format_push_string,
  etc.) that are acceptable in a top-level CLI entry point
- Cargo.toml: remove test_tokio_watch from workspace members (the crate
  was a temporary test harness that is no longer needed)
- Remove tracked build artifacts that should never have been committed:
  a.out, default_generic3 (3.7 MB binary), libgf256.rlib, and a
  rustc-ice crash dump from January 2026

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
